results.norm: No section may be approved on self-review alone. All sections require at minimum one independent reviewer. Sections with a plausible pathway to patient harm require review by all interfacing agents plus at least one non-interfacing agent. Competence to review a section requires being able to articulate its failure modes before reviewing it; an agent who cannot must disclose this immediately.

results.norm: Before individual review begins, each agent states the assumptions their code makes about other sections and the guarantees their code provides to sections that call it.
